creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
The code for handling 4K alignment was changed recently (4 days ago in stable/10; 6 weeks ago in head).

Can you please try the following snapshot(s) and get back to us?

>>> 10.1-STABLE

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=278027

CD/DVD: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/10.1/FreeBSD-10.1-STABLE-amd64-20150201-r278028-disc1.iso

USB: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/10.1/FreeBSD-10.1-STABLE-amd64-20150201-r278028-memstick.img

>>> 11.0-CURRENT

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=276027

CD/DVD: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/11.0/FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20150201-r278031-disc1.iso

USB: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/11.0/FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20150201-r278031-memstick.img
